return(function(...)local b,n do local T,g,r,m,v=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function W(b,n)local g=0 for r=0,7,1 do local m=b/2+n/2 if m~=T(m)then g=g+2^r end b=T(b/2)n=T(n/2)end return g end local d,t="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\151\246\021\202\129\244\166\v\014\229\176\233\202\a\207\164\162\232\203\016\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local Q=65 local f=1692 local X=true local function C(b)local C={}for n=1,#b,2 do local T=v(b,n,n+1)C[#C+1]=m(T,16)end local D={}for b=0,3,1 do local n=C[b+1]local T=((n-f)+256)%256 local g=r(d,b%16+1)local m=r(t,b%Q+1)D[b+1]=W(W(T,g),m)end local h=((D[1]+D[2]*256)+D[3]*65536)+D[4]*16777216 local B={}for b=1,h,1 do local n=C[b+4]if X and b%2==0 then n=(n%16)*16+T(n/16)end local m=((n-f)+256)%256 local v=(b-1)%16+1 local D=(b-1)%Q+1 local h=r(d,v)local N=r(t,D)B[b]=g(W(W(m,h),N))end return table.concat(B)end local h={}n=setmetatable({},{__index=function(b,n)return h[n]end;__call=function(b,n)return h[n]end,__mod=function(b,n)return h[n]end;__mul=function(b,n)return h[n]end;__metatable=false})function b(n)local T=h if not T[n]then for b=1,#D,1 do local g=D[b]local r=type(g[1])=="number"and g[1]or g[2]if r==n then local b=type(g[1])=="string"and g[1]or g[2]T[n]=C(b)break end end end return n end end return(function(T,r,m,v,W,d,t,f,S,g,C,h,x,D,l,N,X,E,B,R,a,K,Q,j)h,K,R,f,l,Q,a,S,g,B,X,N,E,j,D,C,x=function(b)local n,T=1,b[1]while T do f[T],n=f[T]-1,n+1 if f[T]==0 then f[T],Q[T]=nil,nil end T=b[n]end end,function(b,n)local T=D(n)local r=function(r,m,v)return g(b,{r,m;v},n,T)end return r end,function(b,n)local T=D(n)local r=function(r,m,v,W,d,t,Q)return g(b,{r;m,v,W,d;t;Q},n,T)end return r end,{},function(b,n)local T=D(n)local r=function(r)return g(b,{r},n,T)end return r end,{},function(b,n)local T=D(n)local r=function(r,m,v,W,d,t,Q,f)return g(b,{r,m;v,W;d,t;Q,f},n,T)end return r end,function(b,n)local T=D(n)local r=function(r,m,v,W)return g(b,{r,m;v,W},n,T)end return r end,function(g,m,v,W)local xp={}local
